'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 35''' was the thirty-fifth issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[August 28]], [[2002]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*Creation of the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Clone Army]]
*[[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]]
*[[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]]
*[[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]]
*[[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] - [[Great Pit of Carkoon/Legends|The Great Pit of Carkoon]]
*[[R0/5T.N1 tree feeder|5T Tree Feeder]]
*[[Orbital nightcloak|Imperial Orbital Nightcloak]]
*[[Zam Wesell/Legends|Zam Wesell's]] Airspeeder
